title: 0.28: Tests fail: Test ../../techlibs/ecp5/cells_sim.v ->../../techlibs/ecp5/cells_sim.v:448: syntax error
body:
### Version

0.28

### On which OS did this happen?

BSD

### Reproduction Steps

Rn tests

### Expected Behavior

n/a

### Actual Behavior

```
Test ../../techlibs/achronix/speedster22i/cells_sim.v -> ok
Test ../../techlibs/anlogic/cells_sim.v -> ok
Test ../../techlibs/coolrunner2/cells_sim.v -> ok
Test ../../techlibs/ecp5/cells_sim.v ->../../techlibs/ecp5/cells_sim.v:448: syntax error
../../techlibs/ecp5/cells_sim.v:448: error: invalid module item.
gmake[1]: *** [Makefile:855: test] Error 2
gmake[1]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/cad/yosys/work/yosys-yosys-0.28'
*** Error code 1
```
